name: RunwayML
what_it_does: AI video generation API for creating short video clips from text prompts or images using Runway's Gen-3 Alpha and other models, designed for creative and commercial video production workflows.
use_cases: Text-to-video generation for automated content production agents
Image-to-video animation — bringing static images to life with AI motion
Video style transfer and editing for post-production automation pipelines
Marketing video generation from product images or descriptions
Short-form social media content generation at scale
not_for: Long-form video generation (limited to short clips, typically 4-10 seconds)
Real-time video generation (generation takes minutes, not seconds)
Highly specific or controlled video outputs — results are still probabilistic
Budget-sensitive production at high volume — per-second pricing adds up quickly
best_when: You need professional-quality AI video generation via API with one of the best-in-class models (Gen-3) and want to integrate video generation into automated content pipelines.
avoid_when: You need long videos, precise control over specific video elements, or are cost-sensitive — video generation is expensive at scale.

auth.notes: Bearer token API key. Keys require a paid plan — no free API tier. Runway account needed with API access enabled (separate from consumer account).

pricing.paid_tiers: Credits: ~$0.05/second of video generated; Gen-3 Alpha Turbo cheaper than Gen-3 Alpha; ~$1 per 5-second clip
pricing.notes: No free API tier — API access requires paid subscription. Pricing is per second of generated video. Consumer plans cheaper per credit but API access may require higher tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits based on account tier; queue-based generation

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: API is relatively new and documentation is still maturing. Error messages are functional but not always specific about generation failures.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Video generation is non-deterministic — same prompt produces different videos. Task IDs allow polling for the same generation request.
known_agent_gotchas: Generation takes 1-3 minutes — agents must implement async polling, not synchronous requests
No free API tier — all API usage costs money immediately
Content policy is enforced and can reject prompts without detailed explanation
Generated videos expire after a time period — agents must download and store them promptly
API is separate from the Runway web application — features available in UI may not be in API
Task queue can back up during high demand — latency is highly variable
Image-to-video requires proper image preprocessing (resolution, aspect ratio) for best results

security_score_components.security_notes: Generative video/AI API. API key auth. Generated content IP ownership varies — check ToS. No user data training by default. Large file uploads — use signed URLs.
